body:
Fixes #2001.

## Summary

- Stop using solve-log `statfs('/')` resource snapshots as Docker task filesystem-size fallbacks in Telegram completion disk diagnostics.
- Sample Docker's task-container writable layer while a Docker-isolated session is still running, persist the latest sample, and use only that Docker-scoped sample when a fresh completion inspect is unavailable.
- Persist `containerFilesystemLastBytes` and `containerFilesystemLastObservedAt` across bot restarts.
- Update issue #1999 disk fallback coverage to reflect the corrected semantics: explicit Docker completion size wins, but resource markers are not task-size fallbacks.
- Add a patch changeset and the required issue #2001 case study with captured issue/PR metadata and screenshot evidence.

## Reproduction

Issue #2001 shows a Docker-isolated task where the repository grew from 10 MB to 12 MB, but the completion message reported `Container filesystem size` as 54.8 GB to 55.2 GB and emitted the >5 GB warning. The new regression test recreates that shape with small `📊 [DISK]` repository markers and large `📈 [RESOURCES]` `statfs('/')` markers, then verifies the resource values are not reported as per-task Docker usage.

## Verification

- `node tests/test-issue-2001-docker-disk-usage.mjs`
- `node tests/test-issue-1999-session-monitor-disk-fallback.mjs`
- `node tests/test-issue-1927-session-store.mjs`
- `node tests/test-issue-1945-session-monitor-integration.mjs`
- `node tests/test-issue-1945-disk-diagnostics.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh`
- `npm test` (`All 297 selected test file(s) passed.`)
- `git diff --check`

## Case Study

- Analysis: `docs/case-studies/issue-2001/README.md`
- Screenshot evidence: `docs/case-studies/issue-2001/assets/issue-2001-screenshot.png`
- Captured issue/PR metadata: `docs/case-studies/issue-2001/*.json`

## References Used

- Docker CLI `docker inspect --size`: https://docs.docker.com/reference/cli/docker/inspect/
- Docker Engine API container size fields: https://docs.docker.com/reference/api/engine/
- Node.js `fs.statfsSync(path)`: https://nodejs.org/api/fs.html#fsstatfssyncpath-options

title: fix: scope Docker disk usage to task container
